programme.title: Life and Death of Tupac Shakur, The
programme.desc: Tupac Shakur, a renowned hip-hop artist, transformed rap from a trend to a complex art form

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac Shakur?
programme.desc: After Tyson's fight in Vegas, Tupac and Suge clashed with rival Orlando Anderson, sparking violence.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Marilyn Kananen, 65, disappears. Her children suspect their abusive father, gone for 15 years, has returned. Detectives find evidence that turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Heather Church's skull found 2 years post-abduction; clues lead to a prolific U.S. serial killer.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Nearly two decades later, cold case detectives use new technology to solve Lisa Summers' murder.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: A prison in the desert of Arizona uses old army tents instead of prison cells.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: In a brutal prison, inmates dominate, while fearful guards stay outside; only the strongest survive.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: Dallas County Jail, with 7,100 beds, houses diverse inmates and faces turf wars from 300 daily arrivals.

programme.title: Gang World
programme.desc: Going inside the most dangerous of motorcycle gangs, the Hells Angels.

programme.title: Prison Dogs
programme.desc: A groundbreaking programme allows prison inmates to care for and train puppies as service dogs.

programme.title: Code Of Silence - Trail Of Murder
programme.desc: A documentary about the Boston Bandits gang in the 1990’s known for armored car and bank robberies.

programme.title: Behind the Screams, Real American Horror
programme.desc: The program, set in Small Town America in 1954, depicts graphic violence and sexual situations

programme.title: Behind the Screams, Real American Horror
programme.desc: The program follows the 1974 missing young women case, inspired by "The Silence of the Lambs

programme.title: Behind the Screams, Real American Horror
programme.desc: The program tells the story of a power-hungry sadist in Chicago who kills teenage boys

programme.title: Behind the Screams, Real American Horror
programme.desc: The family in Cottage City, Maryland, is haunted by strange noises and a dripping sound

programme.title: Behind the Screams, Real American Horror
programme.desc: The story follows a family in a rural farmhouse, plagued by unexplained events and supernatural phenomena.

programme.title: Behind the Screams, Real American Horror
programme.desc: A terrifying tale of 6 suspects abducted from Turkey Springs, Arizona, inspired by a Hollywood horror film

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: The Central Prison of Sofia is a European prison that is practically in ruins.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: Miami Dade Boot Camp offers minor offenders rigorous drills as a better alternative to harsh jail life.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: Madagascar's Antanimora Prison exemplifies overcrowding in Africa, plagued by disease, hunger, and vermin.

programme.title: The Unperfect Crime
programme.desc: The story of the serio-comic 1997 Loomis-Fargo armoured heist and its bumbling underdog perpetrators.

programme.title: 72 Hours: True Crime
programme.desc: An American becomes one of Canada's most prolific bank-and-jewellery bandits.

programme.title: Crisis in Cocaine Valley
programme.desc: A documentary crew gains rare access to Peru's Cocaine Valley, once a major drug zone, now near collapse.

programme.desc: The program, set in Small Town America in 1954, depicts graphic violence and sexual situations

programme.title: Sugar Wars
programme.desc: This documentary tells the story of Angelo Lonardo and the Cleveland Mafia in which he was part of.

programme.title: Scarface: The Al Capone Story
programme.desc: Alphonse Gabriel Capone, was a notorious gangster who ruled an empire of crime in the Roaring Twenties

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: In the late 1800's, looking at the origins of the gambling and horse racing rackets.

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: Looking at multiple bosses throughout the 1940s and 1950s and the rise of Sam Giancana.

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: Taking a trip through the outfits' decades long involvement in the labor rackets.

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: Why did the outfit bosses had the Spilotro brothers murdered?

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: The downfall of the Chicago Outfits' most powerful family.

programme.title: The New Chicago Mob
programme.desc: The final blow for the mob came from one murder that sank the remaining outfit hierarchy.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld
programme.desc: Cops and politicians are targeted by real life hired killers operating in the Philippines.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld
programme.desc: Cambodia has created an infamous breeding ground for child prostitution and sex tourism.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld
programme.desc: Drug trafficking makes nearly US $20 million every day with 1.7 million addicts in the Philippines.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld
programme.desc: Prostitution is illegal in Mongolia, however, this doesn’t stop criminals from exploiting young women.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld
programme.desc: See the dangerous hostage situations that take place when professional pirates target massive tankers.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld
programme.desc: Authorities, dealers, and victims reveal this lucrative business in Cambodia, Thailand and Malaysia.
